headline: Jensen Exit Puts Zoetis Growth Pipeline And Valuation In Spotlight
summary: Jensen Investment Management has fully exited its position in Zoetis (NYSE:ZTS). The fund cited concerns around slowing sales growth and an underwhelming drug pipeline. This move represents a shift in confidence from a long-term institutional shareholder and may influence broader investor sentiment. Zoetis, a major player in animal health pharmaceuticals and vaccines, is closely watched as pet ownership, livestock productivity and veterinary care remain important themes for many portfolios...
